segments.text: Blessed is he who considers the poor;
The Lord will deliver him in time of trouble.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The Lord will preserve him and keep him alive, And he will be blessed on the earth; You will not deliver him to the will of his enemies.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The Lord will strengthen him on his bed of illness; You will sustain him on his sickbed.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Lord, be merciful to me; Heal my soul, for I have sinned against You.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: When will he die, and his name perish?
segments.speaker: Enemies

segments.text: When he comes to see me, he speaks lies; His heart gathers iniquity to itself; When he goes out, he tells it.
segments.speaker: Enemies

segments.text: All who hate me whisper together against me; Against me they devise my hurt.
An evil disease clings to him. And now that he lies down, he will rise up no more.
segments.speaker: Enemies

segments.text: Even my own familiar friend in whom I trusted, Who ate my bread, Has lifted up his heel against me.
O Lord, be merciful to me, and raise me up, That I may repay them.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: By this I know that You are well pleased with me, Because my enemy does not triumph over me.
As for me, You uphold me in my integrity, And set me before Your face forever.
Blessed be the Lord God of Israel From everlasting to everlasting! Amen and Amen.
segments.speaker: David
